name: mozi
description: Codex plugin for an end-to-end NPU operator development harness, including normalized operator PRD generation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate normalized operator PRDs for NPU harness work.
interface.longDescription: Mozi is a Codex plugin for an end-to-end NPU operator development harness. The current workflow provides $mozi:create-prd to generate a normalized operator PRD from a brief user prompt.
defaultPrompt: Use $mozi:create-prd to generate a PRD for AddRelu.
Create a normalized operator PRD from a brief prompt.
Prepare a structured PRD document for a new NPU operator.
